criteria.description: The 4 @pytest.mark.regression DRG-staleness tests pass with their markers removed; spec-kitty doctrine regenerate-graph --check is green.
criteria.evidence: WP01 (8de93eed) removed the 4 #2770-tied @regression markers; the tests pass as ordinary blocking tests (4 passed, independently re-verified with uv run); regenerate-graph --check fresh; baseline 289/765/11 intact (regen/citation already landed by S-C). Scoped strictly to 3 owned files, no other @regression touched.
criteria.notes: Durable un-pin re-arms the gate against future recurrence.

criteria.description: On a fresh project, charter activate makes the synthesized-DRG freshness signal report stale (where it previously reported fresh); reconciliation returns it to fresh.
criteria.evidence: WP03 (7bc87cdac) wired run_consistency_check parity into _compute_synthesized_drg (read-path). Tests: activate->stale->reconcile->fresh, deactivate symmetric, deactivate-to-empty, cascade single-signal, merge_defaults-seeded visibility (writer-agnostic). Wiring traced to the live compute_freshness path (not dead code). 22 tests green.
criteria.notes: Reuses the existing parity authority (C-007); composed with content-identity, #2732 preserved.

criteria.description: A project missing references.yaml never yields a permanent-stale None; freshness resolves to a definite verdict or a single actionable recovery step.
criteria.evidence: WP02 (27fea64e5) added a fail-closed preflight (_raise_if_bundle_incomplete, separate helper) that surfaces an actionable 'run charter generate' message before the real-run write path can persist an un-healable None. 4-file hash unchanged (no #2773 stopgap). 12 tests green.
criteria.notes: Q1 resolved fail-closed (operator decision 01KXRVT2KA...); keeps #2773 references.yaml deprecation clean.

criteria.description: The implement-boundary preflight reports all outstanding charter-owed prerequisites in one pass.
criteria.evidence: WP04 (edcfdd6e7) rewrote _derive_blocked_reason to enumerate every non-passing check (charter_source/synced_bundle/synthesized_drg) into the single blocked_reason string. Single-failure output byte-identical; per-check verdicts unchanged; result.py schema untouched; C-004 fence (2157b analyzer-freshness OUT) tested by monkeypatch. 33 tests green.
criteria.notes: Real fix site is _derive_blocked_reason (not _attempt_auto_refresh, which already batches) — corrected by the post-tasks squad.

criteria.description: Default charter activate spawns zero synthesis/regenerate subprocesses; --resynthesize leaves the signal fresh immediately; the spec-kitty upgrade migration path is unaffected.
criteria.evidence: WP05 (fad232e45) added --resynthesize to activate/deactivate reusing the existing generate+synthesize entry points (identity-checked, single authority). NFR-001 spy: default path zero synthesis calls (both commands). NFR-003: promote_activations (migration/org_charter) triggers no synthesis. End-to-end: fresh with flag, stale without. 62 tests green; commit_plan untouched (C-001).
criteria.notes: Typer command-body reuse judged sound; residual signature-coupling watch-item documented (non-blocking follow-up).

criteria.description: The #2732 content-identity tests remain green; the hash of an unchanged bundle is unchanged by this mission.
criteria.evidence: WP02 pins a complete-bundle sha256 (byte-unchanged); WP03 asserts unchanged-bundle->unchanged-hash and the fresh-seed built_in_only pass-state (no spurious stale). compute_bundle_content_hash recipe, write-side stamps, built_in_only normalization, and fresh-seed early-exit all untouched. Broader charter/charter_runtime suites green (1623 passed).
criteria.notes: Parity is a separate signal composed with content-identity, never a hash input (NFR-002).

criteria.description: Default charter activate/deactivate performs zero synthesis/regenerate subprocess (call-count/subprocess spy).
criteria.evidence: WP05 subprocess/call-count spy patches the genuine generate/charter_synthesize source attributes; asserts call_count==0 on default activate and deactivate.
criteria.notes: Hot-path preserved; eager refresh only via --resynthesize.

criteria.description: DRG zero-delta: regenerate-graph --check green and a fresh regeneration is byte-identical to the committed graph.yaml; baseline counts frozen.
criteria.evidence: WP01: regenerate-graph --check fresh; TestDRGZeroDelta (289/765/11) green un-pinned; a fresh regeneration matches the shipped graph byte-for-byte.
criteria.notes: Baseline unchanged from the S-C-landed value.
